status: runtime install-proven for Vendor Onboarding v1.15

invalidNoPortalValues.note: Empty object failed product review/import feedback.
Empty array was tested in v1.14 and failed install.

generationGuidance: When a YAPK package has no portal, emit PortalInfo as JSON null.
Do not use empty object or empty array as a no-portal placeholder.
When an actual portal is included, use the product-schema-compatible portal object and validate separately.
validationGuidance: Generated-final validators must pass PortalInfo null.
Generated-final validators must fail PortalInfo empty object.
Generated-final validators must fail PortalInfo array.
Schema validators may normalize null only for schema compatibility after recording the product import rule.
